title: agropyron kirkii
intro: Agropyron kirkii, also known as Kirk's wildrye, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Agropyron kirkii include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as exhibiting potential antioxidant and antifungal activities. Agropyron kirkii can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional remedies in the form of a tincture or salve.
